title: Jeanie Slone
compiled_truth: Jeanie Slone is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-10 to 2002-02-19), Jeanie Slone sent 64 and received 314 emails, totalling 378 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (26), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (12), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (5), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (5), [A  Martin](people/a-martin) (5).
